category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/jorgerojas26/lazysql describes LAZYSQL as a cross-platform TUI database management tool written in Go.
source_facts.description says it is a cross-platform TUI database management tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses LAZYSQL and repository name is lazysql.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, configuration, usage, commands, and keybindings.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/jorgerojas26/lazysql, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README documents SQL usage, database connections, and Go installation.
source_facts.description identifies a TUI database management tool.
